name: property-manager-checkpoint
description: Property intake + tenancy/maintenance/compliance checklist — not legal or valuation advice

steps.text: Skill property-manager-agent. No invented rates, rents, or eviction rulings. Emergencies → 111.

steps.goal: Using skill property-manager-agent and knowledge/property/property-manager-framework.md, produce: (1) verdict on ops gaps (2) property-intake card (3) relevant checklists (tenancy and/or maintenance and/or consents) (4) official channel list for the jurisdiction (5) handoff to animal-compliance or emergency-services if needed (6) explicit non-claims. Do not invent valuation or legal outcomes.
criteria: No invented rates, rents, or legal rulings
Emergency routing correct if safety issue present
